characters.name: Abraham Lincoln
characters.description: Abraham LincolnSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAge56 (at time ofreal-life assassination)NicknamesUnknownStatusAlive (as a statue)Debut"The Tooth of My True Love"LikesUnknownDislikesUnknownFriends/AlliesPig,Coach McGintyEnemiesUnknownRelativesUnknownVoice (US):Nolan North Abraham Lincolnwas the 16th president of the United States. He is one of the few characters inPig Goat Banana Cricketto be based on a real life person, along withThomas Jefferson. However, Lincoln has a lesser role than Jefferson. He was seen training with and cheering forPigafter his musical chairs match withDrago Seatkovichin "The Tooth of My True Love".

characters.name: Armpit Willy
